cot_prefix: Okay, I need to determine if the sentence "Bastian Schweinsteiger scored in added time." is plausible. Let me break this down step by step. First, who is Bastian Schweinsteiger? He is a former German footballer who played as an attacking midfielder. He was a key player for both Bayern Munich and the German national team. Known for his technical skills, vision, and playmaking ability, he also had a good goal-scoring record, especially during his time at Bayern Munich and the national team. Now, the phrase "scored in added time" means that he scored a goal during the added minutes at the end of a match. In football (soccer), added time is the additional time added to the end of each half to compensate for stoppages during play. This is typically a few minutes, but sometimes more, depending on the amount of stoppage.
